nasb.text: They were scattered for lack of a shepherd, and they became food for every beast of the field and were scattered.

esv.text: So they were scattered, because there was no shepherd, and they became food for all the wild beasts. My sheep were scattered;

cnv.text: 牠們沒有牧人，就分散了，作了田野一切走獸的食物。

ccb.text: 因为没有牧人，羊群便流离失散，成了野兽的食物。
